5.name: The Upper Reaches
5.description: Globs of decaying matter seem to writhe on the floor. However, the disgusting goo seems to trail off to both the east and the west. To the south, there is only a rough hewn wall.

6.name: The Eastern Turn
6.description: The tunnel has many sharp projections that may make travel difficult. The south and west seem to be the only ways that the tunnel continues.

7.name: The Tunnel
7.description: The tunnel seems to reach out with a myriad of teeth; but, of course those are only the evidence of whatever had cut out this path into the rock.

14.name: The Tunnel Of Obedience
14.description: Many chains are scattered about, as well as huge shackles and restraints. It looks as if this area could hold a lot of unwilling servants in permanent bondage.

15.name: The Arch Of Service
15.description: A large arch spans the entrance to the west. On it are strange letters carved in an interesting script.

16.name: Slave Corner
16.description: Strange carvings cover the walls, and they all seem to depict the importance of servile industriousness. Strange rings with chains attached dot the walls to the south.

17.name: South Of The Smith
17.description: A looming darkness covers the area as soot and ash coat the floor and surrounding walls. The stench of smoke lingers in the air, making it difficult to breathe.

18.name: Former Smithy of Yarbelek the Troll
18.description: Heat once shimmered here indicated by the blackened furnace. Soot is everywhere with footsteps leading in and out of the area. A large indent in the ground indicates that something heavy was dragged out of here. An empty barrel is the only thing that remains, rotting and falling apart.

19.name: The Echoing Tunnel
19.description: A strange pulsation seems to reverberate through the tunnel. It seems to sound like distant breathing. The air also seems to be getting hotter toward the west.

20.name: Turn In The Tunnel
20.description: The tunnel takes a sharp turn toward the south. To the west, there seems to be a muffled sound that is constant and rhythmic.

21.name: The Novice`s Arch
21.description: A great arch looms into the tunnel from the east. Rough hewn stones create a strange presence in the arch; almost as if there were some malignant force inhabiting it.

22.name: The Novice`s Mess
22.description: Large tables are set end to end in the center of the room, and they appear to be prepared for dinner. Plates, forks, and knives are lined up along the outer edge of the tables in an orderly way.

23.name: Novice`s Chambers
23.description: Bunk beds fill the spartan room. Huge piles of blankets fill the corners of the room along side of a strange altar with melted candles atop it.

24.name: Kitchen Corner
24.description: Strong smells of cooking come from the west. Underneath the odors there seems to be a strange reptilian scent intermixed with a strong odor of decay.

25.name: Kitchen Dump
25.description: A small lizard sits chained to the wall. All about him the burnt refuse of the slave kitchen sits scattered.

26.name: The Dining Area
26.description: Small trenchers lay scattered about the floor amongst scraps of decayed food. The odor of cooked matter fills the air about you. The walls appear to have small protrusions carved in them that serve as places to sit. The accommodations are definitely not elegant.

27.name: Cook Corner
27.description: Strange odors drift past your nose. To the north, there seems to be the soft chime of metal on stone. To the east, the tunnel continues.

28.name: Slaves Kitchens
28.description: Pots of boiling water send billowing clouds of steam throughout the kitchen. Cooking utensils hang from the walls and ceiling intertwined with strange meats and cheeses. In fact, the meat has an uncomfortable resemblance to something that you cant seem to put you finger on.

29.name: Kitchen Storeroom
29.description: Large barrels and boxes litter the floor. There seems to be very little order within the room. Strong smells pound your proboscis.

30.name: The Lower Storeroom
30.description: Boxes and crates line the rock walls of the chamber. A small table sits in the middle of the room with an oil lamp on it. Rats glare at you from amid the loose straw on the ground.

31.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
31.description: Huge marks cover the walls in traditional troll style. Their proportions add a feeling of weight to the walls and ceilings of the tunnel. Some of the symbols seem to glow and pulsate with an eerie red hue.

32.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
32.description: This section of tunnel show the characteristic marks and design of troll workmanship. Heavy, crude, and Gothic proportions call attention to the builders of this earthen way.

33.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
33.description: The tunnel walls are scarred and broken. Huge symbols carved with crude efficiency are everywhere. Even the ground has rough circles and arcane symbols torn into it.

34.name: The Lower Storeroom
34.description: Great casks of wine and ale are stacked against the west wall of the chamber. Spider webs obscure other storage vats making their contents difficult to see. Pieces of broken bone are cast all about in wild profusion.

35.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
35.description: Many troll marks cover the walls in mute testimony to the gigantic handiwork of the artisans responsible for the tunnel. An evil glow erupts from the scars which make up some of the larger symbols.

36.name: Troll Mark Tunnel
36.description: The tunnel starts to show less of the traditional troll marks and more strange, arcane symbols. The glow from the marks starts to increase to the east.

37.name: East Troll Turn
37.description: To the north and the west are the only avenues of advancement from this turn in the tunnel.

38.name: Hound Way
38.description: Sets of leashes are tied to strange posts along the wall to the east. To the west, there seems to be some kind of stains along the wall at about a meter from the floor. You have lost 144 experience.

39.name: Hound Way
39.description: Many dark blotches are on the floor. They are circular in shape and piled up in concentrically smaller circles. Small bits of bone stick up from the surface of these piles.

40.name: Hell Corner
40.description: South and west offer the only ways to go. To the south, there is a smell that is canine in nature. To the west, there seems to be a slightly egg like smell.

41.name: Troll Way
41.description: The marks on these walls are very different from the south tunnel. They seem to be from a different type of troll or clan of trolls. The marks are more artistic, though not as deeply hammered into the rock.

42.name: Troll Way
42.description: Few troll markings are in evidence in the tunnel. A strange aura makes the walls seem to vibrate almost imperceptibly. Dry wisps of air, filled with a sulfurous aroma, pass through the tunnel.

43.name: Troll Way
43.description: The markings seem to be dissipating slowly to the east. But, the remaining carved surfaces seem to ooze a malignant energy. The scrapes in the floor seem to reach up and hold the feet of anything that passes by.

44.name: Troll Common
44.description: One large table dominates the room. There are no chairs, nor are there pieces of silverware, only many enormous trenchers stacked one upon the other.

45.name: Troll Quarters
45.description: Behemoth beds stretch across the large chamber. These beds seem built for giants, not trolls, and they are hard and lumpy.

46.name: Troll Way
46.description: Strange throbbings come from the multitude of carvings and symbols etched into the rough rock walls of the tunnel. Strong sulfur smells slip through the air in a sensuous serenade of odor.

47.name: Troll Way
47.description: Designs fill the walls and floor. They are of a fantastic nature, many look like arcane symbols from some dark and lurid dream. Their size, however, makes them stand out and become more than illusion.

48.name: North Troll Turn
48.description: To the south, the smell of earth works and sulfur cling to the air. To the east, strange carvings in the ground and walls add a sense of foreboding.

49.name: Entrance to Golgar`s Mine
49.description: The west side of the tunnel gleams with the crystalline formations of sulfur and quartz laden rock. Huge gashes mar the surface of the tunnel and an unearthly smell emanates from the walls.

50.name: Golgar`s Sulfur Mine
50.description: Huge chunks of sulfur rest upon the floor of the chamber. Pick and shovel marks, along with what seem like claw marks, line the back of the chamber. Smells like rotten eggs fill the air as puffs of yellow smoke seem to puff out of the scarred walls. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust. A narrow seam of copper is stained yellow with sulphuric deposits.

51.name: Golgar`s Sulfur Mine
51.description: A gaping, yellow maw of rock fills the chamber. Tools lay heaped in great profusion about the raped earth. Small torches are pounded into the walls and the buttresses of wood seem hardly capable of holding the great weight of the rock above.

52.name: Entrance to Golgar`s Mine
52.description: Quartz and sulfur seem to be in abundantly embedded into the west side of the tunnel. Marks of mine work lead into the darkness to the west. A narrow seam of copper is stained yellow with sulphuric deposits.

53.name: Troll Turn
53.description: Heavy stones are piled in the corner of the turn. North and east are the only ways available from here.

54.name: Kennel of the Hellhounds
54.description: Large pieces of bone, shattered and crushed, lay all about the floor. Many remnants of clothing are intermixed with the debris that lays about. A few unidentifiable bits of meat sit within the ghoulish mixture. You have lost 432 experience.

55.name: Kennel of the Hellhounds
55.description: A few pieces of cloth sit in the corner and a small table and chair rest against the far north wall. A leash and a small whip rest on the table. You have lost 432 experience.

56.name: Corridor of Praise
56.description: A small corridor leads to the north into a larger and more forbidding room. It seems that the only way to go is north, or back up.

57.name: The Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
57.description: Large columns take most of the interior that is visible from here. A red glow fills the huge chamber and makes visibility difficult in the gloom. Shapes, both large and small, seem to flit about the mist.

58.name: Golgar`s Temple
58.description: Huge columns support a ceiling of red stalagmites covered in a bright red ochre of moss. Red mists drift lazily around the interior of the chamber. The aura of evil is present everywhere.

59.name: The Pillar of Pain
59.description: A huge pillar stands here. It is covered with horrifying images of the most excruciating kind. Beasts of unknown origin are set in deep relief on the surface of the pillar and they act out the hideous dance of writhing infliction and receiving of pain. As you linger here, pain begins to invade your body, rising in tempo until you find it difficult to concentrate, your muscles contracting involuntarily...your mind screams at you to leave!

60.name: The Pillar of Lust
60.description: This pillar is shaped as a huge male gland, though it doesn't seem necessarily human, and scenes of debauchery cover its veined surface. Wicked and obscene seem to be the main characteristic of the reliefs and they seem to have an effect on you. You begin to daydream while remembering the physiques of past lovers...

61.name: The Pillar Of Confusion
61.description: Another pillar stands before you. It is a riotous mix of scenes that make the eyes swim. Great reliefs illustrating the most unharmonious of actions, scenes of intense discord and wild motion which beg to drag you into their insanity. Your mind reels and your memories become clouds of forgotten names and places, images you insist on recognizing, but which mystify, a sensation of being lost.

62.name: The Pillar of Sulfur
62.description: Yellow, putrid and odoriferous characterize this evil looking monstrosity. A pillar made of sulfur stands ominously before you, the stench of which causes you to gag in uncontrollable fits. Dark iron veins are threaded with bright yellow sulphur crystals.

63.name: The Temple Of Golgar
63.description: A wall seems to be visible to the west in the red gloom that hangs about the chamber. To the east, the pillars seem to be less threatening at a safe distance.

64.name: The South West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
64.description: The walls of the temple are richly arrayed with sensuous pictures and reliefs. Many scenes depict the ultimate in pain and despair, as well as, many depictions of the vices.

65.name: A Cramped Passageway
65.description: An opening in the rocky cavern offers a path to a familiar scent of fresh water to the west, while east returns to the musky sulfur smell of Golgar's inner lair. The walls glisten with the reflection of a water source, which seems to combat the red glow of the lair. w

66.name: Landing Before The Lake
66.description: A spacious rocky landing offers safety from the stench of sulfur, which seemingly wafts in from a passageway to the east. The cavern offers no other apparent exit aside from diving into the lake itself, leading who knows where. You can't go that way.

67.name: The West Edge Of Golgar`s Temple
67.description: To the west the wall of the temple show vivid scenes of all the vices personified. All the pictures are vivid with color and inlaid with gold and jewels.

68.name: The Pillar of Will
68.description: Scenes of strife and power illuminate the surface of this great erection. A dark beauty pervades the reliefs; it seems at once that the images were at one time much more fair. You are a bit unsure of the relevance of this pillar, but nevertheless it instills a great feeling of confidence and direction in you.

69.name: The Pillar Of Death
69.description: A huge figure with skeleton hands and sunken eyes is set into the ebony surface of this pillar. A chill seems to sit about the pedestal of the stone monolith, and for a fleeting instant you see piles of objects and bones lying about, lost in their timeless tomb...

70.name: The Pillar of Despair
70.description: Images of famine, disease and the visages of hopeless souls on the verge of self-destruction jump out of the seductively carved stone of this pillar. To look at it for any length of time would be a great test of the soul and as you do you look upon yourself as if disembodied, sweeping through emaciation, the ravages of disease and the grimaces of racking pain. Too long here and you will begin to fade away...

71.name: The Pillar Of Greed
71.description: The sheen of pure gold reflects off the pillar before you. Scenes of avarice fill the reliefs that seem molded from the very bones of the pillar. As you scan the sometimes humorous panels of the pillar you find yourself often thinking that you should have the gold and gems that you've heard others possess. It isn't fair that they have it and you don't. You must do something about this as soon as possible.

72.name: The East End Of Golgar`s Temple
72.description: A red haze fills the air and a palpable presence of evil seems to lurk near bye. A powerful malignity seems to emanate from all around.

73.name: The North East End Of Golgar`s Temple
73.description: The corner of the temple offers some respite from the gloom and red mist that hang about the pillars in the great chamber.

74.name: The North Wall Of The Temple
74.description: A dreadful vision stares out at you from the gilded walls to the north. The image is of some strange demonic beast. The eyes seem to follow your every step. Bright yellow flowers bloom here, their petals tinged with mineral dust.

75.name: The Door of Agony
75.description: Screaming figures chased by unnameable horrors are emblazoned on the front of this great door. Great hinges and huge knockers make this a forbidding site.

76.name: The North West Corner Of Golgar`s Temple
76.description: To the south, great pillars rise from the gloom. To the east, a huge door looms up almost unexpectedly. This seems to be a safe place, except for the walls that almost ... move?

77.name: Golgar's Forge
77.description: The cavern has been carved out here to make way for a large forge. Using the dwarves' labor and architecture through slavery. The daemons have adopted a way to fashion arms and armor for themselves, and quite possible others, judging by the sheer size of the forge and crafted gear available. The cavern opens up to the south and east here while the sheer heat of flames attack you.

78.name: Northern Wall of Golgar's Forge
78.description: The excavated forge opens up in all directions here, except to the north. The heat from the furnaces to the southeast carries itself throughout the area. A staging area for raw iron ore is scattered about here haphazardly. Taking a quick glance, you notice that an assembly line has been made for rapid production of arms and armor.

79.name: North East Corner of Golgar's Forge
79.description: An enormous smelting pot for siphoning out the iron from the ore has been carved out of the cavern stone itself. Various funnels of stone rock carry the molten metal towards the south, caught by an array of molds. If you were looking for the source of the heat, you found it. The boiling pot is fueled by a roaring inferno below it.

80.name: South East Corner of Golgar's Forge
80.description: Dozens of molds are strewn about and meticulously placed to receive molten iron through funnels of stone that originate from the smelting pot to the north. Quite the operation. The various molds make up an odd-looking set of armor; not quite that of the average humanoid.

81.name: Southern Wall of Golgar's Forge
81.description: The area is littered with anvils for the final preparation of the forge production. Wooden buckets of water for quenching the iron accompany each anvil. Tools are strewn about, mostly discarded from overuse. Better watch your step.

82.name: The South West Corner of Golgar's Forge
82.description: An enormous staging area for arms and armor have been set aside here next to an array of anvils directly to the east. Racks made of loose iron rods and driftwood make up the storage area. If the heat wasn't enough, the cacophony of hammers clanging against anvils barrages your ears. The forge opens up to the east, while the north offers a way to escape the heat and noise.

83.name: Golgar`s Chambers
83.description: A red room spreads out before you. It seems incredibly hot and the red haze in the room adds to the perception.

84.name: Golgar`s Chambers
84.description: The haze is lifting and a great altar is to the north. The chamber is almost inviting, but the heat is constant.

85.name: Golgar`s Chambers
85.description: The red colors of the chamber are numbing. The altar to the north recedes then comes closer with each heartbeat.

86.name: Golgar`s Chambers
86.description: Skulls and bones, skulls and bones, bones and blood are what comprise this hellish altar. Blood bespackled and gore begrimed, a blade sits upon it.

87.name: Golgar`s Chambers
87.description: Bones dripping with red gore make up the altar that sits to the north. A pile of bones and skulls are at its base. A strange blade sits upon it.

88.name: Golgar`s Chambers
88.description: Skulls and bones comprise the altar that sits to the north. Blood colored stains drip from its surface. A great blade rests upon it.

89.name: Golgar`s Chambers
89.description: To the east, there is a large altar that bears the mark of some evil patron.

90.name: Sacrificial Altar
90.description: A grotesque altar stands here. It is made of bone. It is covered in blood. It is evil. A gaping skull peers up from the edge of this malevolent object.

91.name: Golgar`s Chambers
91.description: A huge pile of bones spill from the west onto the floor. Slime and fleshy muck make it a slippery surface to walk on.

92.name: Throne Room
92.description: A large throne sits here. It is made completely of skulls. It looks to be from the late hell period.

93.name: The Chamber Of Persuasion
93.description: Large barrels filled with strange metal items fill the room as they are set at the base of many cots that have restraints built in. In addition, there are braziers between each row of cots.

94.name: The Overseer`s Cage
94.description: The bars in the door make a depressing sight.

95.name: The Upper Reaches
95.description: The rough walls seem to stretch to the east and to the west. There seems to be a smell coming from the east, but you cant seem to put your nose ... er, finger... on it.

96.name: The Western Turn
96.description: The tunnel takes a sudden turn south or east depending on which way you're headed.

97.name: In The Tunnel
97.description: The rock walls seem to crush down upon you as you make your way. Strange crevices hide small things with glowing eyes.

98.name: Another Turn
98.description: The way south has abruptly ended with a wall of rock; only north and east are available to you.

99.name: The Tunnel
99.description: Rough rock still bears the mark of some ancient digging tool; giant slashes into the rock give mute testimony to the toil that took place in this subterranean passage.

100.name: The Tunnel
100.description: The tunnel seems to contract and expand and you feel some kind of presence, an evil presence, emanating from the rock.

101.name: The Way Round
101.description: The tunnel seems to be getting more polished in appearance. Only the way to the north and west seem open.

8.name: Deep In The Lair
8.description: The faint odor of sulfur permeates the tunnel. Small streams of water trickle down and along the rough walled shaft.

9.name: The Deep Lair
9.description: The walls stream with mineral laden waters and iridescent pools settle along the edges of the tunnel.

10.name: The Deep Lair
10.description: Faint noises echo in the tunnel as the trickle of water sets the background rhythm.

11.name: Near The Slave Quarters
11.description: To the south there are strange bits of debris strewn across the floor. The light emanating from the south cast long shadows in the tunnel. To the east, the tunnel continues in darkness.

12.name: Outside The Slave`s Quarters
12.description: The light from the slave`s quarters spills out into the tunnel. Grim evidence of physical cruelty lay strewn across the floor: bits of chain, discarded rags stained with blood, and piles of rat gnawed bones.

13.name: Slaves Quarters
13.description: Chains hang from all the walls making a macabre melody as they rustle against the rock walls. Bunk beds fill the interior of the room and a strange box sits in the corner.

102.name: The Drafty Tunnel
102.description: The scent of fresh air fills the room as a slight breeze drifts by.

103.name: The Drafty Tunnel
103.description: The air flows faster and cleaner from the east. To the west, there seems to be growing darkness.

104.name: The Drafty Tunnel
104.description: Air rushes through the tunnel creating a low mournful hum. Small gnats thicken the air and make it hard to breath.

105.name: The Drafty Tunnel
105.description: The smell of water fills the air. However, there are other smells that begin to gnaw away the pleasant coolness.

106.name: The Beating Chamber
106.description: The ring of metal on metal seems to be coming from somewhere, but it also seems to be coming from everywhere.

107.name: The Deep Lair
107.description: The tunnel runs both north and east from here. To the north, there seems to be a faint light and to the east only blackness.

108.name: The Tunnel D`toilette
108.description: Piles of orcan refuse stream out into the tunnel from the south. Hoards of maggots burrow through the defacatory expulsions and one rather large maggot eyes you curiously with red glowing eyes. The power of the ocean gradually subsides.

109.name: Le Toilette de Orc
109.description: Piles of Orcan feces cover the floor, and amongst it writhe strange creatures that struggle for existence.

110.name: The Deep Lair
110.description: The tunnel continues to the east and west. There seems to be a lot of moisture dripping from the walls. The floor is damp, but not slippery.

111.name: The Rough Turn
111.description: The air seems to be slightly clearer here, as if there were a source of fresher air in the vicinity. The tunnel continues to the north and west.
